productDisplayName: Nike Men Lunareclipse Blue Sports Shoes
description: Style noteWondering whether to choose between a cushioned shoe or a stability shoe? Think no more, for nike brings to you the best of both rolled into one with the nike Lunareclipse 2 running shoe. Created for runners of all gaits, the floating heel support clip fits snugly around the heel, making it an incredibly comfortable shoe. Being a Nike+ range shoe, you can add on to it compatible iPods, Sports watches, sport bands and others items from the Nike+ range and clock your runs, calories, track your routes and more.Product DetailsBlue sports shoe with a mesh forefoot, tongue, backfoot and mouth for maximum ventilationSynthetic overlays for added shoe structureBackfoot wrap around badge for enhanced support to the heelFlywire technology on the side panels for ultra-lightweight support, reduced slippage and to lock the foot in placeSynthetic twill laces with a perforated tongue for snug FitPadded sockliner for in-step comfort and snug fitReflective elements for enhanced visibility in low-light conditionsLow profile midsole made of Lunarlon cushioning for lightweight comfort, maximum shock absorption and better feel of the roadInnovative floating heel support clip for an enhanced ride and buttery smooth transition to midstance by reducing excessive rolling of the footPlush, seamless interior for an incredibly comfortable fitWedge shaped foam to limit excessive pronationBlown rubber outsole for efficient stride and maximum cushioningMultiple rubber and waffle traction patterns offering a smooth strideMultiple flex grooves for a more natural and effortless runScoop under the heel for better impact protectionMaterial and CareSynthetic, rubberDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
